name: python3-joblib
title: python3-joblib
summary: tools to provide lightweight pipelining in Python
description:
tools to provide lightweight pipelining in Python
Joblib is a set of tools to provide lightweight pipelining in
Python. In particular, joblib offers:
.
- transparent disk-caching of the output values and lazy
re-evaluation (memoize pattern)
- easy simple parallel computing
- logging and tracing of the execution
.
Joblib is optimized to be fast and robust in particular on large,
long-running functions and has specific optimizations for numpy arrays.
.
This package contains the Python 3 version.
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use python3-joblib because tools to provide lightweight pipelining in Python.
When the engagement is in the install phase, use python3-joblib as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair python3-joblib with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `python3-joblib --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
